mapper.sql: id, db_create_time as createTime, db_modify_time as updateTime, namespace, name, display_name, description, worker_node, variables, dag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM workflow_definition WHERE namespace = #{namespace} AND name = #{name} AND worker_node = #{workerNode} ORDER BY db_create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_definition (namespace, name, display_name, description, worker_node, variables, dag, db_create_time) VALUES (#{namespace}, #{name}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{workerNode}, #{variables}, #{dag}, #{createTime})
